title: Icons are governed semantic systems
summary: Interface glyphs, product icons, status marks, and badges have distinct contracts for meaning, geometry, localization, state, and accessibility.
guidance: Define meaning before form, pair unfamiliar or consequential symbols with text, and provide static and non-color state equivalents.
do: Test baseline, optical weight, RTL, locale, smallest size, contrast, and accessible naming
Route vendor assets through official downloads and licenses
dont: Redistribute vendor assets or let color, animation, or tooltips carry meaning alone
verification: icon family, localization, reduced-motion, contrast, and accessible-name review
